zh.lifeSummary: 當Florence Tylden於1546年出生在英國肯特騰特爾登時，她的父親Nathaniel Tylden31歲，母親Mrs Nathaniel Tylden26歲。她於1567年與George Ely在英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年4月1日在她的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國肯特騰特爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Florence Tylden于1546年出生在英国肯特騰特爾登时，她的父亲Nathaniel Tylden31岁，母亲Mrs Nathaniel Tylden26岁。她于1567年与George Ely在英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1615年4月1日在她的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国肯特騰特爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Tylden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tilden
meanings: English (Sussex): habitational name from Tilden in Benenden, Great and Little Tilden in Marden, or Tilden in Headcorn (all Kent). The placenames may derive from Old English telga ‘shoot, twig’ + denn ‘pasture’ or denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Florence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

variants.name: Florance
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Florence Tylden was born in 1546, in Tenterden, Kent, England, her father, Nathaniel Tylden, was 31 and her mother, Mrs Nathaniel Tylden, was 26. She married George Ely in 1567, in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 April 1615, in her hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Tenterden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Florence Tylden est née en 1546, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Nathaniel Tylden, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs Nathaniel Tylden, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé George Ely en 1567, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 avril 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Florence Tylden 1546 in Tenterden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nathaniel Tylden 31 und ihre Mutter Mrs Nathaniel Tylden 26. Sie hat 1567 in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom George Ely geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. April 1615 im Alter von 69 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Tenterden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Florence Tylden è nata il nel 1546 nel Tenterden, Kent, England, sua padre, Nathaniel Tylden, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mrs Nathaniel Tylden, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato George Ely nel 1567, nel Tenterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Tenterden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Florence Tyldenが1546年にイギリスケントテンテルデンで生まれた時，父Nathaniel Tyldenは31歳，母Mrs Nathaniel Tyldenは26歳であった。1567年にイギリスイギリスケントテンテルデンでGeorge Elyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年4月1日に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスケントテンテルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Florence Tylden(이)가 1546년 영국 켄트 텐터든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nathaniel Tylden(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Nathaniel Tylden(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 텐터든에서 George Ely(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 4월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 텐터든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Florence Tylden nasceu em 1546, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nathaniel Tylden, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Nathaniel Tylden, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com George Ely em 1567, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de abril de 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Florence Tylden родилась в 1546 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Nathaniel Tylden было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Nathaniel Tylden, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Ely в 1567 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 апреля 1615 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Florence Tylden nació en 1546, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Nathaniel Tylden, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs Nathaniel Tylden, tenía 26 años. Se casó con George Ely en 1567, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1615, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra.
